text:
X1050Z_INACTV_OTHR_CD X1050Z Reason for Inactivation: Other Error Requiring Inactivation Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the reason for inactivation of the prior erroneous record is because of an other error requiring inactivation. 0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern) effective 10/01/2023
627 X1100E_ATSTN_DT X1100E_ATSTN_DT X1100E Attestation Date CHAR 8 The data in this column indicates the date that the staff member attested to the completion and accuracy
